rationale: Educ. Code §71.02 governs organization and control of UT San Antonio under its Board of Regents. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts; no conflict exists.
quote: The organization and control of The University of Texas at San Antonio is vested in the Board of Regents of The University of Texas System.
_note: Rule text concerns university governance only; no operative connection to homestead exemption valuations.
